rationale: Diff only adds execution evidence files (manifest.json, result.json) for a no_changes attempt. No code changes implementing any AC items. The result.json claims 'task_succeeded' but the manifest's last execute-bead event is 'no_changes' and no source files were modified.

findings.summary: No source code changes — diff contains only execution-evidence JSON artifacts; none of AC #2-#10 can be satisfied by this commit.
result.json reports outcome=task_succeeded/status=success despite the recorded attempt being a no_changes pass per manifest events; outcome and evidence are inconsistent.

Bead is acknowledged as an epic with open child beads (ddx-87fb72c2, ddx-2589e256, ddx-950321ef, ddx-653f6ac9, ddx-a0cf398b). Tracker should remain open until those close; do not implement at the epic level.
